summary: Stores and emits a boolean control value.
description: Use Bool for an explicit true/false value. With the default value-box widget, bang emits the current value. With widget=toggle or widget=checkbox, bang flips the stored value and emits the new value.
runtimeBehavior: in updates and emits, set updates silently, and bang emits the stored boolean. Toggle/checkbox widgets treat bang as flip-and-emit.

ports.description: Updates the stored value and emits it.
Updates the stored value without emitting.
Emits the current stored value without changing it.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.
Optional display widget. Use toggle or checkbox for Max/Pd-style boolean toggling.

example.title: Bool versus Toggle
example.description: Bool keeps bang as re-emit behavior; Toggle flips on bang.
